name: Claude
best_for: Projects, long-form thinking, writing, strategy, reasoning, building systems.
note: Avoid using for quick searches or social media.

name: Antigravity
best_for: File system manipulation, running code, organizing data, and local execution.
note: Master Worker; always verify file paths before executing edits.

name: OpenClaw
best_for: PC agent tasks — opening apps, automating desktop actions.
note: Avoid using for cloud-based reasoning.

name: DeepSeek
best_for: Coding, mathematics, logic, technical problem solving.
note: Not suited for creative or social tasks.

name: Grok
best_for: Social media, X/Twitter trends, real-time internet, pop culture.
note: Do not use for deep technical work.

name: Gemini
best_for: Image generation, Google Workspace integration, multimodal tasks.
note: Less effective for deep reasoning compared to Claude/DeepSeek.

name: Turbo AI
best_for: Learning, summarizing YouTube videos, study material.
note: Not configured for agentic file tasks.

name: ElevenLabs
best_for: Voice generation, text to speech, realistic voice cloning.
note: Used strictly for voice output.

name: Whisper AI
best_for: Speech to text, transcription, voice input processing.
note: Used strictly for voice input processing.

name: Perplexity
best_for: Real-time research, sourced answers, fact checking.
note: Best for Rule 11 — finding top researchers and live sources.

name: Midjourney
best_for: High quality image creation, visual design.
note: Stronger image output than Gemini for art/design work.

name: Wolfram Alpha
best_for: Math verification, scientific data, calculations.
note: Best for Rule 12 audit — checking your working.

name: NotebookLM
best_for: Deep document analysis, long document Q&A.
note: Good for studying saved notes.

name: Ollama
best_for: Running local LLMs securely and offline.
note: Dependent on local hardware capabilities.

name: Master AI Workflow
best_for: Central logic routing and overall orchestration of Eso.
note: Core backbone script. Do not modify lightly.

name: Backup Reminder
best_for: Notifying and scheduling routine backups.
note: Runs on automated CRON schedule.

name: File Change Logger
best_for: Monitoring the file system and updating action-log.md.
note: Provides the system's operational memory trace.

name: Daily Briefing
best_for: Aggregating tasks, news, and system stats for Ryan.
note: Triggers at the start of the day.

name: Boredom Detector
best_for: Suggesting activities when the system detects idleness.
note: Quirk: triggers proactively.

name: Brain Dump Sorter
best_for: Categorizing unstructured notes into specific domain files.
note: Monitors the Universal Inbox.
